$comment: MailAegis update & announcement channel. Edit this file, commit it, push it — every running copy of MailAegis picks it up within a few hours. See channel/README.md for the field reference.

latest.notes: Quarantine: move a bad message out of the inbox, not just score it.
changelog: Quarantine — move a message to another folder on the server. It acts on the UID, prefers the atomic UID MOVE, and if your server offers no safe way to remove the original it says so instead of pretending. Nothing ever moves on its own.
OAuth 2.0 for IMAP and SMTP: run "mailaegis oauth" and no app password is involved. The only way in to a Microsoft tenant with basic authentication switched off.
Sender allow/block lists, an audit trail and SIEM webhook, undo send, the raw source viewer and defanged IOC export.
Non-English subjects are decoded correctly — long headers are split by the sender's client, and the break was leaving a stray space.
Several mailboxes at once, compose with outbound scanning, search operators, dark mode, an Android app and an installable PWA.

announcements.title: MailAegis is open source — and free forever.
announcements.body: If it saves your team from one wire-transfer fraud, a star on GitHub is all we ask.
